song.title: Jesus, Name Above All Names
song.author: Patricia Cain, Nadia Hearn
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C Em Jesus, name above all names, . Dm Beautiful Savior, . G Dm Em G Glorious Lord. . C Em Emmanuel, God is with us, . Dm G C Blessed Redeemer, living Word.
[V2] Jesus, loving Shepherd, Vine of the branches, Son of God, Prince of Peace, Wonderful Counselor, Lord of the universe, Light of the world.
[V3] Jesus, Way of salvation, King of kings, Lord of lords, The Way, the Truth, and the Life, Mighty creator, my Savior and Friend.
